description_long: This object is a large, menacing blade with a jagged, asymmetrical edge and a pronounced, angular profile. The blade features several deep notches along its spine, giving it a brutal, almost primitive appearance. Its silhouette is aggressive, with a wide midsection that tapers sharply to a pointed tip. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be solid, ending in a small, rounded pommel. The entire object is rendered in a uniform dark color, suggesting it is made from a single material, likely metal. There are no visible decorative elements, guards, or additional attachments, emphasizing its utilitarian and intimidating design.
description: A large, jagged, dark blade with a straight handle and an aggressive, angular silhouette. The design is utilitarian and lacks ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full jagged blade profile and straight handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade's notched edge and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and straight alignment.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, solid, plain pommel, no visible grip texture
